content.text:
{
  "schema": "2.0",
  "description": "CHG Trigger Rules \u2014 Yoda monitors these and raises CHG+Telegram alert when triggered.",
  "lastUpdated": "2026-07-10T11:57:00+10:00",
  "lastUpdatedBy": "Yoda",
  "changeNote": "CHG-0859: Added TRIGGER-01 sub-action 01-CLOUD-OUTAGE-PROBE \u2014 Ollama Cloud outage probe + local OC2 fallback, deferred from CHG-0858 outage-detect no-op.",
  "triggers": {
    "TRIGGER-01": {
      "name": "OC2 Arrival \u2014 Master Gate",
      "condition": "OC2-A and OC2-B physically arrive",
      "detection": "manual \u2014 Ken notifies Yoda",
      "eta": "6\u201313 Jul 2026",
      "status": "not_applicable",
      "firedAt": null,
      "closureNote": "OC2-A/B arrival gate closed; only OC2A commissioned as single-node PROD. HA pair deferred. See CHG-1783.",
      "description": "OC2 arrival is now the master gate. All OC2-era actions are sequenced as sub-actions under TRIGGER-01, executed in priority order after hardware is online.",
      "subActions": [
        {
          "id": "01-PHYSICAL",
          "name": "Hardware Setup",
          "priority": "critical",
          "action": "Unbox OC2-A + OC2-B. Connect power, network, Tailscale. Verify both nodes reachable on tailnet."
        },
        {
          "id": "01-OPENCLAW",
          "name": "OpenClaw Install on OC2-A/B",
          "priority": "critical",
          "action": "Install OpenClaw v2026.5.27+ on OC2-A (primary) and OC2-B (standby). Configure HIVE HA pair. Deploy tech agent fleet (~10 agents: Yoda, Atlas, Thrawn, Forge, Lando, Mon Mothma, Warden, Ahsoka, Luthen; Shield/Lex/Sage stay here). Krennic parked."
        },
        {
          "id": "01-CLAUDE-RESTORE",
          "name": "CLAUDE RESTORE \u2014 Anthropic API Key Re-provisioning",
          "priority": "high",
          "action": "Ken provides new Anthropic API key. Execute SOP: (1) Store in Keychain as 'ainchors-anthropic-api-key', (2) Add auth.profiles.anthropic:default to openclaw.json, (3) Add anthropic model aliases, (4) Update model-policy.json whitelist, (5) Run validate-fallback-chain.sh, (6) Restore agent primary models from claude-restore-config.json.",
          "linkedChgs": [
            "CHG-0349",
            "CHG-0373",
            "CHG-0393"
          ],
          "linkedTkts": [
            "TKT-0165",
            "TKT-0241"
          ],
          "note": "Folded from standalone TRIGGER-14 per Ken directive 2026-05-29. Claude Restore now gates on OC2 arrival \u2014 no point restoring on OC1 when platform is about to migrate."
        },
        {
          "id": "01-PLATFORM-SEPARATION",
          "name": "Platform Separation \u2014 OC1 Business Standalone",
          "priority": "high",
          "action": "Execute Platform Separation per approved option paper. Phase 1: Wipe OC1, fresh OpenClaw install, deploy 6 business agents (Aria lead + Shield/Lex/Sage duplicated + Spark + Forge-ops). Phase 2: OC2 tech platform validated \u22651 week before OC1 wipe. Phase 3: Cutover Angie/KL team to OC1 business node. Phase 4: Stabilisation.",
          "linkedDocs": [
            "docs/options/Platform-Separation-Business-Stream-Option-Paper-v1.0.md",
            "docs/options/Platform-Separation-Business-Stream-Feasibility-Assessment-v1.0.md"
          ],
          "kenDecisions": [
            "C1: Second OpenClaw license \u2705",
            "C2: Separate Ollama Cloud sub \u2705",
            "C3: New Google Workspace for tech \u2705"
          ],
          "acceptedRisks": [
            "No SRE on business node",
            "Governance Triad divergence",
            "Double maintenance overhead"
          ],
          "note": "Platform Separation approved 2026-05-29. Phase 0 prep can start now. Full migration gated on OC2 arrival + validation."
        },
        {
          "id": "01-PG-MIGRATION",
          "name": "PostgreSQL Migration OC1 \u2192 OC2",
          "priority": "high",
          "action": "Restore PG from OC1 backup to OC2-A. Configure HA replication to OC2-B. Validate all 32 tables, ticket state, cost history. Slim PG on OC1 (business-only tables or PG-free)."
        },
        {
          "id": "01-A",
          "name": "qwen3.5:cloud Reassessment",
          "priority": "low",
          "action": "Re-benchmark qwen3.5:cloud on OC2. Re-test with think:false on all 5 benchmark tasks. If avg latency \u226420s \u2192 approve for async/batch Tier 2. If still fails \u2192 close out permanently."
        },
        {
          "id": "01-B",
          "name": "Orchestrator MD Version Bump",
          "priority": "high",
          "action": "Version bump SOUL.md + YODA_RULES.md + ORCHESTRATOR.md to reflect OC2 architecture, HA state, Gemma4:26b local inference, Platform Separation."
        },
        {
          "id": "01-C",
          "name": "SecretRefs Keychain Integration",
          "priority": "medium",
          "action": "Implement SecretRefs with macOS Keychain integration (TKT-0228). Migrate all API keys from hardcoded config to structured SecretRefs.",
          "ticket": "TKT-0228"
        },
        {
          "id": "01-NEW-WORKSPACE",
          "name": "Tech Stream Google Workspace",
          "priority": "high",
          "action": "Create new Google Workspace for tech stream (C3). Migrate Yoda/tech agent auth from kenmun@ainchors.com to new account. Aria keeps kenmun@ on OC1 business node."
        },
        {
          "id": "01-CLOUD-OUTAGE-PROBE",
          "name": "Ollama Cloud Outage Probe + Local OC2 Fallback",
          "priority": "high",
          "action": "Design and implement a proper Ollama Cloud outage probe (not localhost:11434). On cloud unreachable, trigger automatic fallback to local OC2 models (gemma4:26b / gemma4:31b-coding-mtp-bf16 per TRIGGER-03). Re-enable outage-detect.sh logic with cloud-aware probe. Validate against model-policy.json and run full outage/standby drill.",
          "dependencies": [
            "TRIGGER-02",
            "TRIGGER-03"
          ],
          "linkedChgs": [
            "CHG-0858",
            "CHG-0859"
          ],
          "linkedTkts": [
            "TKT-0973"
          ],
          "note": "Deferred from CHG-0858 because outage-detect.sh probed localhost:11434, which is invalid for Ollama Cloud and risks false standby. Local fallback requires OC2 HA and Gemma4 local validation (TRIGGER-03)."
        },
        {
          "id": "01-OC2A-PRODUCTION",
          "name": "OC2A Fresh Install \u2014 Option 4 Strong Separation",
          "priority": "critical",
          "action": "Execute docs/plans/OC2A-Fresh-Install-Plan-v1.0.md. OC2A becomes self-governing full production Nexus; OC1 demoted to non-privileged sandbox with no admin path to OC2A. Phases sequenced as TKT-0757 through TKT-0762. Begin after 01-PHYSICAL and 01-OPENCLAW complete.",
          "linkedChgs": [
            "CHG-0868"
          ],
          "linkedTkts": [
            "TKT-0757",
            "TKT-0758",
            "TKT-0759",
            "TKT-0760",
            "TKT-0761",
            "TKT-0762"
          ],
          "note": "Replaces prior Platform Separation sub-action (01-PLATFORM-SEPARATION) which assumed OC1 business-only node. New model: OC2A full production, OC1 sandbox only, strong separation."
        }
      ]
    },
    "TRIGGER-02": {
      "name": "OC2 HA Live",
      "condition": "OC2-A and OC2-B both online, validated, HA failover tested",
      "detection": "manual \u2014 validated after TRIGGER-01 sub-actions complete",
      "action": "Activate HA architecture. Configure NAS shared state. Run full failover drill.",
      "status": "not_applicable",
      "firedAt": null,
      "closureNote": "HA pair not commissioned; OC2A running single-node PROD. HA deferred.",
      "dependencies": [
        "TRIGGER-01"
      ]
    },
    "TRIGGER-03": {
      "name": "Gemma4 Validated on OC2",
      "condition": "Gemma4:26b confirmed running on OC2 at acceptable performance",
      "detection": "auto \u2014 check after TRIGGER-01 completes",
      "action": "Benchmark gemma4:26b + gemma4:31b-coding-mtp-bf16 on OC2. If pass rate \u226575%, swap governance agents (Shield/Lex/Sage/Warden) from gemma4:31b-cloud to local gemma4:26b (Tier 1). Update model-policy.json.",
      "status": "fired",
      "firedAt": "2026-07-14T08:25:58+10:00",
      "validatedBy": "forge/infra",
      "closureNote": "OC2A validated as live PROD HIVE lead node: Mac16,11, 48GB RAM, Tailscale 100.123.95.47. CHG-1783.",
      "dependencies": [
        "TRIGGER-01",
        "TRIGGER-02"
      ],
      "modelsToEvaluate": [
        "ollama/gemma4:26b (local \u2014 OC2 48GB)",
        "ollama/gemma4:31b-coding-mtp-bf16 (local \u2014 OC2 48GB)",
        "ollama/gemma4:31b-cloud (cloud \u2014 keep/replace/upgrade decision)"
      ],
      "note": "Gemma4 cloud model assignments frozen until OC2. No changes to gemma4:31b-cloud cron assignments now. Full gemma4 model strategy review (local + cloud) at OC2 gate. Ken decision: 2026-06-02.",
      "kenDecision": "Reviewed all cron model assignments 2026-06-02. No changes. Gemma4 cloud models (gemma4:31b-cloud) remain as-is. 429 quota exhaustion is a billing issue, not an architecture issue. Full review deferred to OC2 when local gemma4:26b becomes viable."
    },
    "TRIGGER-04": {
      "name": "OpenClaw Security Patch",
      "condition": "New OpenClaw version released with security fix",
      "detection": "automated \u2014 daily cron checks github.com/openclaw/openclaw/releases",
      "action": "Critical CVE: update within 48h. High: within 7 days.",
      "cronId": "6bd53c89-c208-45a9-b77a-47157443c1ef",
      "currentVersion": "2026.5.27",
      "status": "fired",
      "lastChecked": "2026-06-04T06:01:00+10:00",
      "firedAt": "2026-06-13T06:00:00+10:00",
      "lastDecision": {
        "version": "2026.6.6",
        "decision": "defer+sandbox",
        "reason": "v2026.6.6 heavy on security boundary tightening (transcripts, sandbox binds, MCP stdio, Telegram DM cache fix, fail-closed exec approvals). Closer to High than feature-only. Defer production (OC1 weeks from decommission per Platform Separation), sandbox validation on port 28789 in parallel \u2014 bake validated build into OC2 fresh install (TRIGGER-01).",
        "decidedBy": "Ken Mun",
        "decidedAt": "2026-06-13T07:53:00+10:00",
        "chgId": "CHG-0521"
      },
      "availableVersion": "2026.6.6",
      "tickets": [
        "TKT-0501",
        "TKT-0502"
      ]
    },
    "TRIGGER-05": {
      "name": "Ollama Cloud PoC PASS",
      "condition": "PoC Phase 5 returns PASS or PARTIAL PASS",
      "action": "Implement 4-tier model strategy. Ken decision gate required before Phase 6.",
      "status": "passed-phase6-implemented",
      "firedAt": "2026-05-02T10:13:00+10:00",
      "note": "Full PoC PASS. kimi: Q=4.6/5, L=6.8s avg. glm-5.1: FAIL (221s+). qwen3.5: FAIL (42.3s). Phase 6 implemented."
    },
    "TRIGGER-06": {
      "name": "OpenClaw v4.0 Ships",
      "condition": "OpenClaw v4.x release detected",
      "detection": "automated \u2014 daily release check cron",
      "action": "P3 gate assessment. Present Ken with native multi-agent vs CrewAI evaluation within 24h.",
      "status": "monitoring",
      "firedAt": null
    },
    "TRIGGER-07": {
      "name": "First P2 Client",
      "condition": "First paying client onboarded to P2 platform",
      "detection": "manual \u2014 Angie/Ken notifies Yoda",
      "action": "Execute onboarding checklist. Run S1-S7 compliance audit. Tier 0/1 only for client data.",
      "status": "pending",
      "firedAt": null
    },
    "TRIGGER-08": {
      "name": "Daily API Cost Threshold",
      "condition": "Daily API spend exceeds thresholds",
      "detection": "automated \u2014 cost-tracker.sh daily",
      "thresholds": {
        "t1": 60,
        "t2": 80,
        "t3": 100
      },
      "action": "T1: alert Ken. T2: escalate. T3: pause and alert.",
      "status": "monitoring",
      "lastFired": "2026-05-15T02:00:54Z"
    },
    "TRIGGER-09": {
      "name": "Warden Model Drift",
      "condition": "Model drift detected by Warden",
      "detection": "automated \u2014 Warden cron 15min (83accf7b)",
      "action": "Yoda remediates within 1 heartbeat. Log CHG. Alert Ken.",
      "status": "active"
    },
    "TRIGGER-10": {
      "name": "RETIRED \u2014 Business Stream Migration OC1\u2192OC2",
      "status": "retired",
      "retiredAt": "2026-05-29T22:10:00+10:00",
      "retiredBy": "Ken Mun",
      "replacedBy": "TRIGGER-01 sub-action 01-PLATFORM-SEPARATION",
      "note": "Original plan: migrate Aria from OC1 to OC2. Superseded by Platform Separation \u2014 OC1 becomes standalone business node, OC2 is tech-only. No migration needed."
    },
    "TRIGGER-11": {
      "name": "glm-5.1 No-Think Mode Availability",
      "condition": "Monthly check: Ollama releases no-think glm-5.1 variant",
      "detection": "automated \u2014 monthly cron (bb47c6de)",
      "action": "Re-benchmark B2+B4. If latency \u226420s and quality \u22653.5 \u2192 add as Tier 2.",
      "status": "monitoring",
      "lastChecked": "2026-07-02T09:00:00+10:00"
    },
    "TRIGGER-12": {
      "name": "Agent Allowlist Sync",
      "condition": "model-policy.json tierStrategy updated",
      "detection": "automated \u2014 cron 30min (6a059e9e)",
      "action": "Run allowlist-sync.sh. Log CHG. Alert Ken with diff.",
      "status": "active"
    },
    "TRIGGER-13": {
      "name": "Semantic Memory Store Go-Live",
      "condition": "OC2 stable + MinIO in prod 2+ sprints",
      "action": "Activate TKT-0153 semantic memory. Deprecate Option B tiered split.",
      "status": "pending",
      "tkt": "TKT-0153",
      "dependencies": [
        "TRIGGER-01",
        "TRIGGER-02"
      ]
    },
    "TRIGGER-14": {
      "name": "Phase 3: Event Sourcing Design",
      "condition": "P2 stable: \u22652 SME clients live, uptime >99% for 30-day rolling window",
      "action": "Atlas designs event sourcing migration from optimistic locking. Preserve TKT-0104 agent_state_history schema as seed.",
      "status": "pending",
      "approvedBy": "Ken Mun",
      "approvedAt": "2026-05-14",
      "linkedCHG": "CHG-0308"
    },
    "TRIGGER-15": {
      "name": "P1\u2019P2 Checkpoint: Golden Blueprint Review",
      "condition": "P2 launches \u2014 first SME client onboarded (target Aug 2026)",
      "action": "Atlas: full refresh of both golden blueprints. Architecture Delta Summary for Ken. Requires APPROVED before P2 ops begin.",
      "status": "pending",
      "approvedBy": "Ken Mun",
      "approvedAt": "2026-05-14",
      "linkedCHG": "CHG-0318"
    },
    "TRIGGER-16": {
      "name": "P2\u2019P4 Checkpoint: Golden Blueprint Review",
      "condition": "TRIGGER-14 fires (post-P2 stable, event sourcing design begins)",
      "action": "Atlas: full refresh of both golden blueprints. Add Phase 3 event sourcing architecture. FSI trajectory detail.",
      "status": "pending",
      "approvedBy": "Ken Mun",
      "approvedAt": "2026-05-14",
      "linkedCHG": "CHG-0318"
    },
    "TRIGGER-17": {
      "name": "Annual Review: Golden Blueprints (May each year)",
      "condition": "May annually \u2014 platform anniversary month",
      "action": "Atlas: full review against live platform state. Prune outdated. Revalidate OKRs/KRIs. Ken approval.",
      "status": "pending",
      "approvedBy": "Ken Mun",
      "approvedAt": "2026-05-14",
      "linkedCHG": "CHG-0318"
    },
    "TRIGGER-18": {
      "name": "Spark: LinkedIn Stability Arc Post",
      "condition": "TKT-0177 closed",
      "action": "Spark writes LinkedIn post on building production agentic AI platform \u2014 gateway stability, event loop saturation, diagnostic process.",
      "status": "pending",
      "linkedTKT": "TKT-0177",
      "approvedBy": "Ken Mun",
      "approvedAt": "2026-05-15"
    },
    "TRIGGER-QBR": {
      "name": "Quarterly QBR \u2014 Agent Fleet Review + Tribal Knowledge Audit",
      "condition": "Every Jan/Apr/Jul/Oct",
      "action": "1. Agent Fleet Review (TKT-0130). 2. Tribal Knowledge Audit (TKT-0394) \u2014 scan all working memory + agent SOUL.md files for skill reference decay, new undocumented patterns, stale refs. Produce prioritized extraction backlog. Ken approves candidates. Executed per TKT-0393 CREST pattern (Forge on flash). 3. Orchestrator MD version bump. 4. Roadmap Refinement (TKT-0125).",
      "status": "recurring",
      "firstDue": "2026-07-01",

        "TKT-0130",
        "TKT-0125",
        "TKT-0394"
      ]
    }
  }
